objective: Add a read-only carto stats CLI command that loads the graph, calls graphStats(), and prints pluralised node/edge counts in one line.
key_changes: Added graphStats to the import from ./store/graph.js in src/cli.ts
Action handler calls load() then graphStats() and prints pluralised output via chalk.green
Pluralisation uses two independent ternaries: nodes === 1 ? 'node' : 'nodes', edges === 1 ? 'edge' : 'edges'
No changes to graph.ts — command is purely I/O thin shell in cli.ts
No save() call, no flags, no arguments — command is strictly read-only
Empty/missing graph prints '0 nodes, 0 edges' via load()'s existing empty-graph default
Updated routing.md to document the stats command in inventory, arguments section, and error handling
Build, lint, and all 21 tests pass cleanly
